utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Look at that guy by the window , wow !

emotion_cause.span: 3_Look at that guy by the window

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He is awfully short and I think he is talking to himself . And to be completely honest , he is not that good in bed .

emotion_cause.span: 4_He is awfully short and I think he is talking to himself . And to be completely honest , he is not that good in bed .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , what is wrong with me lately ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean it is like every guy I see ... I mean look here .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Look at that guy for example , I mean normally that is not someone I would ... would be attracted to , but right now , with the way I am feeling , all I want to do is rip off his sweatpants and fanny pack .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Wait a second ! This is about the fourth month of your pregnancy , right ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: This is completely normal , around the fourth month your hormones start going crazy .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Really ? ! So this has happened to you ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh and keep in mind , now , I was carrying triplets so in , you know , medical terms I was ... I was thrice as randy .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wow ! This explains so much ! Last weekend , I went from store to store sitting on Santa lap .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah . Yeah , I remember trying to steal a cardboard cutout of Evander Holyfield from a Foot Locker .
